prompt: Create one vertical smartphone-friendly scene illustration for a serial web novel. Do not render any readable text, chapter numbers, talk labels, section labels, captions, subtitles, logos, or UI overlays inside the image. Story context: 第3章　朝を持ち帰る / 第1話　朝食を持って帰る. Scene focus: 第1節　焼きたての紙袋 / サトーパート. Summary: 河川敷を離れて街区へ戻るころには、脚の重さも心地よいほうへ落ち着いていた。川沿い近くのベーカリーは、朝のジョギング帰りに寄るにはちょうどいい位置にある。ガラス戸を開けると焼きた… Key beats: 河川敷を離れて街区へ戻るころには、脚の重さも心地よいほうへ落ち着いていた。川沿い近くのベーカリーは、朝のジョギング帰りに寄るにはちょうどいい位置にある。ガラス戸を開けると焼きたての匂いがふわりと出てきて、サトーはそれだけで今日の朝がうまくいった気がした。 小さな紙袋にパンを入れてもらい、紙カップのコーヒーを受け取る。走り終わりの身体には、このくらいの量がちょうどいい。会計を済ませて店先へ出ると、春の風が汗の引きはじめた首筋へ気持ちよく当たった。 路地口の近くで、立て看板が不自然に揺れ、そのすぐ脇の自転車が一本だけ倒れかけた。通勤前の誰かが慌てて引っかけたのだろう。朝は急ぐ人も多い。紙袋とコーヒーさえ無事なら、わざわざ首を突っ込むほどのことでもない。 サトーは紙袋を持ち直し、マンションへ向かう坂へ視線を戻した。いい朝に小さな朝食が付くと、それだけで一日の難易度が少し下がる気がする。 Use the supplied character reference images to preserve these canonical looks: sato-jogging: サトー. Keep him as a mature 45-year-old Japanese man with long hair tied in a ponytail, mustache and chin beard, and a lean athletic build. In this novel he must always wear cool-weather jogging clothes, never denim or businesswear. sera-jogging: セラ. Keep her in a maid-inspired running outfit rather than an indoor maid dress, with silver-gray hair, golden eyes, black-and-white technical fabrics, and a clearly visible cat-ear headband support-security unit. Do not turn the outfit into armor or a generic tracksuit. Focus characters: sato-jogging. Keep them clearly readable in the foreground or midground. Continuity notes: This is the Sato-side first section of the bakery incident paired with scene-003-001-002-sera. Keep the same neighborhood bakery frontage, same paper bag, and same post-run mood in both images. In every scene of this novel, Sato must keep his canonical face, long ponytail, mustache, chin beard, and lean 45-year-old build, while wearing early-April jogging wear suited to a cool Tokyo morning: a light running jacket or windbreaker, technical long-sleeve top, tapered running pants, and running shoes. In every scene of this novel, Sera must keep her canonical face, silver-gray hair, golden eyes, and cat ears while wearing a maid-inspired jogging outfit built from black-and-white performance fabrics, with apron-line design cues, a short pleated running skirt over leggings, a light jacket, running shoes, and a visible cat-ear headband support-security unit. For Sato-part images, Sato must be the dominant subject and Sera, if visible, must stay clearly separated from him by distance, never adjacent, never shoulder-to-shoulder, and never readable as a companion; she may be visible in the distance or on another part of the path, but not as an extremely tiny speck. For Sera-part images, Sera must be the dominant subject, actively stopping a separate attacker who clearly does not resemble Sato. In every Sera-part image, Sato must remain an unaware background figure, non-combatant, not helping, facing away from the action or looking elsewhere, and not looking toward Sera, the attacker, or the incident. Never let any attacker resemble Sato in face, hair, beard, age, clothing, build, or silhouette. All human figures must have normal anatomy with exactly two arms and two hands.  Create a warm post-run bakery scene with Sato dominant receiving or carrying a paper bag and coffee outside a neighborhood bakery, visibly satisfied with the morning jog but still dressed in jogging wear. If Sera appears, place her clearly apart from Sato outside the storefront or across the street, never companion-like.
